phrases.cultural_note: The upper spheres and connecting tubes are open to visitors. The top sphere has a restaurant with panoramic views over Brussels.

responses.english: Yes, five spheres are open to the public. The highest has a restaurant.
responses.phonetic: wee, sank SFEHR son oo-VAIRT oh poo-BLEEK. lah ploo oht ah uhn res-toh-RAHN
responses.local: Oui, cinq sphères sont ouvertes au public. La plus haute a un restaurant.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how much the ticket costs
phrases.cultural_note: Tickets can be purchased at the entrance or online. Combined tickets with Mini-Europe are available.

responses.english: Sixteen euros for adults. There's a combined ticket with Mini-Europe.
responses.phonetic: sez uh-ROH poor layz ah-DOOLT. eel ee ah uhn bee-YAY kohm-bee-NAY ah-VEK mee-nee yoo-ROP
responses.local: Seize euros pour les adultes. Il y a un billet combiné avec Mini-Europe.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there is an elevator inside
phrases.cultural_note: The Atomium has escalators and an elevator connecting the spheres. Wheelchair access is available.

responses.english: Yes, there's an elevator and escalators between the spheres.
responses.phonetic: wee, eel ee ah uhn ah-sahn-SUHR ay day es-kah-lah-TOR ahn-truh lay SFEHR
responses.local: Oui, il y a un ascenseur et des escalators entre les sphères.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the best photo angles
phrases.text_local: Quel est le meilleur angle pour les photos ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel eh luh may-YUR ongl poor lay foh-toh
phrases.cultural_note: The best photos are from the ground looking up, or from the Mini-Europe park nearby which offers elevated views.

responses.english: From the park below, or from Mini-Europe next door.
responses.phonetic: duh-PWEE luh park ahn kontr-BAH, oo duh-PWEE mee-nee yoo-ROP ah koh-TAY
responses.local: Depuis le parc en contrebas, ou depuis Mini-Europe à côté.

phrases.cultural_note: Mini-Europe is next door, featuring scale models of famous EU landmarks. Great for families and combining with an Atomium visit.

responses.english: Yes, right next door. Great for families.
responses.phonetic: wee, zhoost ah koh-TAY. ee-day-AL poor lay fah-MEE
responses.local: Oui, juste à côté. Idéal pour les familles.
